intro: The e-commerce and financial services sectors were the primary targets in a recent wave of cybercrime activity documented across nine reports. The threat landscape from mid-April 2026 was dominated by high-severity incidents, with five such cases recorded alongside two medium and two informational alerts. The campaigns had a global footprint, also impacting online services and multiple other sectors. The threat actors Triad Nexus and W3LL Team were prominently active during this period.
